description_long: This is a decorative bottle with a white and gold color scheme, featuring intricate floral and ornamental patterns wrapping around its body. The bottle has a wide base that tapers smoothly to a narrow neck, which is topped with a gold-colored cap. The front displays a prominent gold emblem and Cyrillic text, suggesting a premium or celebratory beverage, possibly sparkling wine or champagne. A small tag is attached to the neck, adding to its luxurious presentation. The surface appears glossy and reflective, with no visible signs of wear or damage. The bottle is likely made of glass with a metallic or foil wrapping on the neck and cap.
description: A white and gold ornate bottle with floral patterns, a gold cap, and a decorative tag, exuding a luxurious and celebratory appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold emblem, Cyrillic text, and the main decorative label.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the intricate gold floral patterns and the attached neck tag.
description_view_2: Rear view displays more floral designs and a smaller label with text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional gold patterns and the continuation of the decorative motif.
attribute_label_or_branding: Gold emblem and Cyrillic text on the front, with additional gold floral patterns and a small tag attached to the neck.
